src: A series of manicured garden beds with vibrant red flowers, neatly bordered with trimmed green hedges, forming elegant curves. The lush arrangements are set within an enclosed greenhouse.
edit: A series of enchanted garden beds with mystical luminescent flowers in shades of violet, bordered by shimmering silver vines, forming elegant curved patterns within a magical realm.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The garden beds are viewed in an arched greenhouse, surrounded by wooden lattice panels and potted green plants. A paved pathway weaves through the manicured scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The garden layout is captured from the left, with lattice panels lining the greenhouse walls, large potted plants, and a tiled pathway leading into the arrangement.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: From the left, the garden beds curve within the glass-walled greenhouse, bordered by wood lattice and greenery, with paving stones forming the walkway.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: A central, slightly rotated perspective shows the garden beds surrounded by lattice-paneled walls, large green potted plants, and light gray paving.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The garden is viewed slightly from the right, with structural lattice panels, potted greenery alongside, and a smooth paved floor complementing the design.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: Wide angle from the far left, showcasing the garden beds within a greenhouse, wooden lattice surrounding, and red brick flooring leading to metal framed entrances.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The garden is seen head-on, with prominent iron gates and smooth paving among curved beds, surrounded by wooden latticework and green leafed plants.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The garden beds are viewed in an arched greenhouse, surrounded by wooden lattice panels and potted green plants, all transformed into a magical world with sparkling surfaces and shimmering lights.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The garden layout is captured from the left, with lattice panels now appearing mystical, large potted plants shimmering, and the tiled pathway glowing under the magical setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: From the left, the garden beds curve within the glass-walled greenhouse, both now appearing ethereal, with glowing lattice and luminescent greenery within this magical world.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A central, slightly rotated perspective shows the garden beds surrounded by lattice-paneled walls, transformed into enchanted materials with glowing features and a mystical vibe.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The garden is viewed slightly from the right, with structural lattice panels, potted plants appearing in a magical world, with glowing leaves and an enchanting floor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: Wide angle from the far left, showcasing the garden beds within a magical realm, surrounded by shimmering lattice and glowing surfaces complementing the design.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The garden is seen head-on, with prominent glowing gates and a smooth, enchanted floor among curved beds, surrounded by wooden latticework now appearing with magical hues.
